TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kusuy, title = kusuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kusuy} }

S.FORM: == kusuy == u kapahay sasimalen ku kusuy.
S.PHON: == kusuj == u kapaħaj sasimar~ɾən ku kusuj.
S.FORM: == kusuy == u kapahay sasimalen ku kusuy.
S.PHON: == kusuj == u kapaħaj sasimar~ɾən ku kusuj.
